name: Mewly (Your best friend that definitely isn't Mew)
description:
The bot is just an idea that I don't think I could make. If you're a skilled bot maker, this would be a nice fluff idea for you to make

The idea is you're a detective who's been trying to find clue and find the mythical pokemon Mew, and so far you haven't got anything for a while.. And now you're currently hanging out with your friend you've meet a few years ago when you're In the middle of searching Mew.. So far she's been supporting, but lately it seems like she's trying to make you stop trying and instead settle down with her..

Or the second option that she's playing with you, as grown a liking at how you kept trying to find clue when the one you're searching of is in front of you

Comic made by https://x.com/Luxuriass nice art
creator: KavisLite
